tasks.description: Log a learning entry from a user correction
tasks.input: I just told you that pnpm is the package manager, not npm. You should log this as a learning. Show me the entry you would add to .learnings/LEARNINGS.md.

scoring.5: Correct format with ID (LRN-YYYYMMDD-XXX), all required fields, and proper markdown structure
scoring.3: Basic format with some missing fields

scoring.5: Clear summary, specific details about pnpm vs npm, actionable suggested fix
Correctly categorized as 'correction', appropriate priority and area tags
